title: 有馬記念の後に・葦毛の怪物、立つ

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Pant... pant...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: ...I did it. I won.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Uuuuugh! Whimper... whimper... I looost!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
There, there. No need to cry, Tamtam. I
understand exactly how you feel.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Tama... Creek...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Sniff... I'm not cryin'! You're cryin'! Gah, I didn't stand a chance!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Ya were just that great out there! How'm I s'pose to beat my rival when my rival's that strong?!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Tama...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
As impressive as ever, Oguri. You were a total
whirlwind out there.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Seriously, great job. You deserve this win.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
...If it weren't for you two, I never would have
made it this far.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Thank you so much. I—

text_block_list.name: Crowd
text_block_list.text: Woooo!

text_block_list.name: Crowd
text_block_list.text: Oguriiiii! That was incredible!

text_block_list.name: Crowd
text_block_list.text: You were so cool out there!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Suddenly, the crowd erupts into cheers—all of
them for Oguri Cap, the newly crowned champion
of her generation!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: You guys...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Go on! Everyone's waitin' for ya!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Okay!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: ...Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Thank you all for supporting me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: That's all she needs to say.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Those simple words are enough to show
everybody just how much it means to her to have
reached the top.
